name: Mickey Rooney's Easy Baked Eggplant
recipeIngredient: 2 small Eggplants, cut into 1/2 inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate 2 of the garlic cloves (minced) overnight or for 8 hours in tomato sauce, Italian herb mixture, and cooking wine.
2. Coat a medium-sized casserole pan with cooking oil.
3. Layer the eggplant slices in the pan, sprinkling with the remaining 2 minced garlic cloves.
4. Pour 3/4 of the tomato mixture over the eggplant.
5. Layer mozzarella cheese on top.
6. Add the remaining tomato mixture.
7. Sprinkle with minced parsley.
8. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
